design_issues: Settings page, Rates sub-section. Shows current USD→ARS exchange rate. Input to update it manually. Saved indicator. Section header with bold label and divider in neobrutalist style.

Format sub-section below Rates. Options: decimal separator (. or ,), currency symbol position (prefix/suffix), date format (DD/MM/YYYY or MM/DD/YYYY). Toggle or select controls, consistent with the design system.
Config screen — Impuesto de Sellos section
Toggle to enable/disable the 1.49% Impuesto de Sellos tax. When enabled: show calculated tax amount on applicable transactions. Explanatory label below the toggle.

Open drawer state triggered by the hamburger icon at mobile + tablet breakpoints. Mobile (<820px): full-screen overlay with nav items + logout. Tablet (820–1199px): side-panel slide-in extending the 64px icon rail with full labels.
